1	# CLAUDE.md
2	
3	This file provides guidance to Claude Code (claude.ai/code) when working with code in this repository.
4	
5	## Project Overview
6	
7	This is an **independent open-source implementation** of a Claude Codeâ€“style coding agent. The goal is to provide core coding-agent functionality while trimming secondary capabilities. Many modules are stubbed or feature-flagged off. The codebase has ~1341 tsc type errors (mostly `unknown`/`never`/`{}` types) â€” these do **not** block Bun runtime execution.
8	
9	## Commands
10	
11	```bash
12	# Install dependencies
13	bun install
14	
15	# Dev mode (direct execution via Bun). Version prints as 888 when working.
16	bun run dev
17	# equivalent to: bun run src/entrypoints/cli.tsx
18	
19	# Pipe mode
20	echo "say hello" | bun run src/entrypoints/cli.tsx -p
21	
22	# Build (outputs dist/cli.js, ~25MB)
23	bun run build
24	
25	# Lint / format (Biome â€” formatter is DISABLED to avoid massive diffs; lint only)
26	bun run lint
27	bun run lint:fix
28	bun run format
29	
30	# Tests (Bun test runner; config in bunfig.toml, root=".", timeout=10000)
31	bun test
32	bun test test/e2e               # run a directory
33	bun test path/to/file.test.ts   # run a single file
34	
35	# Detect unused exports/dependencies
36	bun run check:unused            # knip â€” config in knip.json
37	
38	# Code health check
39	bun run health                  # scripts/health-check.ts
40	```
41	
42	Requires Bun >= 1.3.11 (use `bun upgrade` â€” older Bun causes spurious errors). Requires a valid Anthropic API key (or Bedrock/Vertex creds).
43	
44	A `pre-commit` hook (`.githooks/`, wired via `bun run prepare` â†’ `core.hooksPath .githooks`) runs `biome lint` on staged `src/*.{ts,tsx,js,jsx}` files. Bypass with `--no-verify` when lint errors are from pre-existing noise.
45	
46	## Architecture
47	
48	### Runtime & Build
49	
50	- **Runtime**: Bun (not Node.js). All imports, builds, and execution use Bun APIs.
51	- **Build**: `bun build src/entrypoints/cli.tsx --outdir dist --target bun` â€” single-file bundle.
52	- **Module system**: ESM (`"type": "module"`), TSX with `react-jsx` transform.
53	- **Monorepo**: Bun workspaces â€” internal packages live in `packages/` resolved via `workspace:*`.
54	
55	### Entry & Bootstrap
56	
57	1. **`src/entrypoints/cli.tsx`** â€” True entrypoint. Injects runtime polyfills at the top:
58	   - `feature()` always returns `false` (all feature flags disabled, skipping unimplemented branches).
59	   - `globalThis.MACRO` â€” simulates build-time macro injection (VERSION, BUILD_TIME, etc.).
60	   - `BUILD_TARGET`, `BUILD_ENV`, `INTERFACE_TYPE` globals.
61	2. **`src/main.tsx`** â€” Commander.js CLI definition. Parses args, initializes services (auth, analytics, policy), then launches the REPL or runs in pipe mode.
62	3. **`src/entrypoints/init.ts`** â€” One-time initialization (telemetry, config, trust dialog).
63	
64	Other entrypoints in `src/entrypoints/`: `mcp.ts` (runs Claude Code as an MCP server, exposing commands like `/review` as tools), and `sdk/` (type definitions + schemas for the `@anthropic-ai/claude-agent-sdk` surface: `coreTypes`, `controlTypes`, `runtimeTypes`, `settingsTypes`, `toolTypes`). The `sdk/` types are the public SDK contract â€” generated files are marked `.generated.ts`.
65	
66	### Core Loop
67	
68	- **`src/query.ts`** â€” The main API query function. Sends messages to Claude API, handles streaming responses, processes tool calls, and manages the conversation turn loop.
69	- **`src/QueryEngine.ts`** â€” Higher-level orchestrator wrapping `query()`. Manages conversation state, compaction, file history snapshots, attribution, and turn-level bookkeeping. Used by the REPL screen.
70	- **`src/screens/REPL.tsx`** â€” The interactive REPL screen (React/Ink component). Handles user input, message display, tool permission prompts, and keyboard shortcuts.
71	
72	### API Layer
73	
74	- **`src/services/api/claude.ts`** â€” Core API client. Builds request params (system prompt, messages, tools, betas), calls the Anthropic SDK streaming endpoint, and processes `BetaRawMessageStreamEvent` events.
75	- Supports multiple providers: Anthropic direct, AWS Bedrock, Google Vertex, Azure.
76	- Provider selection in `src/utils/model/providers.ts`.
77	
78	### Tool System
79	
80	- **`src/Tool.ts`** â€” Tool interface definition (`Tool` type) and utilities (`findToolByName`, `toolMatchesName`).
81	- **`src/tools.ts`** â€” Tool registry. Assembles the tool list; some tools are conditionally loaded via `feature()` flags or `process.env.USER_TYPE`.
82	- **`src/tools/<ToolName>/`** â€” Each tool in its own directory (e.g., `BashTool`, `FileEditTool`, `GrepTool`, `AgentTool`).
83	- Tools define: `name`, `description`, `inputSchema` (JSON Schema), `call()` (execution), and optionally a React component for rendering results.
84	
85	### UI Layer (Ink)
86	
87	- **`src/ink.ts`** â€” Ink render wrapper with ThemeProvider injection.
88	- **`src/ink/`** â€” Custom Ink framework (forked/internal): custom reconciler, hooks (`useInput`, `useTerminalSize`, `useSearchHighlight`), virtual list rendering.
89	- **`src/components/`** â€” React components rendered in terminal via Ink. Key ones:
90	  - `App.tsx` â€” Root provider (AppState, Stats, FpsMetrics).
91	  - `Messages.tsx` / `MessageRow.tsx` â€” Conversation message rendering.
92	  - `PromptInput/` â€” User input handling.
93	  - `permissions/` â€” Tool permission approval UI.
94	- Components use React Compiler runtime (`react/compiler-runtime`) â€” output has `_c()` memoization calls throughout.
95	
96	### State Management
97	
98	- **`src/state/AppState.tsx`** â€” Central app state type and context provider. Contains messages, tools, permissions, MCP connections, etc.
99	- **`src/state/store.ts`** â€” Zustand-style store for AppState.
100	- **`src/bootstrap/state.ts`** â€” Module-level singletons for session-global state (session ID, CWD, project root, token counts).
101	
102	### Context & System Prompt
103	
104	- **`src/context.ts`** â€” Builds system/user context for the API call (git status, date, CLAUDE.md contents, memory files).
105	- **`src/utils/claudemd.ts`** â€” Discovers and loads CLAUDE.md files from project hierarchy.
106	
107	### Feature Flag System
108	
109	All `feature('FLAG_NAME')` calls come from `bun:bundle` (a build-time API). In this build, `feature()` is polyfilled to always return `false` in `cli.tsx`. This means all internal features (COORDINATOR_MODE, KAIROS, PROACTIVE, etc.) are disabled.
110	
111	### Stubbed/Deleted Modules
112	
113	| Module | Status |
114	|--------|--------|
115	| Computer Use (`@ant/*`) | Stub packages in `packages/@ant/` |
116	| `*-napi` packages (audio, image, url, modifiers) | Stubs in `packages/` (except `color-diff-napi` which is fully implemented) |
117	| Analytics / GrowthBook / Sentry | Empty implementations |
118	| Magic Docs / Voice Mode / LSP Server | Removed |
119	| Plugins / Marketplace | Removed |
120	| MCP OAuth | Simplified |
121	
122	### Key Type Files
123	
124	- **`src/types/global.d.ts`** â€” Declares `MACRO`, `BUILD_TARGET`, `BUILD_ENV` and internal Anthropic-only identifiers.
125	- **`src/types/internal-modules.d.ts`** â€” Type declarations for `bun:bundle`, `bun:ffi`, `@anthropic-ai/mcpb`.
126	- **`src/types/message.ts`** â€” Message type hierarchy (UserMessage, AssistantMessage, SystemMessage, etc.).
127	- **`src/types/permissions.ts`** â€” Permission mode and result types.
128	
129	## Working with This Codebase
130	
131	- **Don't try to fix all tsc errors** â€” they don't affect runtime. `tsconfig.json` has `strict: false` and `skipLibCheck: true`; `tsc` is not part of CI. Lint (Biome) is the gate, and many `suspicious` rules are deliberately off (see `biome.json`) to tolerate the loose output.
132	- **`feature()` is always `false`** â€” any code behind a feature flag is dead code in this build.
133	- **React Compiler output** â€” Components have memoization boilerplate (`const $ = _c(N)`). This is normal.
134	- **`bun:bundle` import** â€” In `src/main.tsx` and other files, `import { feature } from 'bun:bundle'` works at build time. At dev-time, the polyfill in `cli.tsx` provides it.
135	- **`src/` path alias** â€” tsconfig maps `src/*` to `./src/*`. Imports like `import { ... } from 'src/utils/...'` are valid.
136
